summary: EXP-144 reframes moon altitude argument as logical DEDUCTION from Snell law universality (medium bends all light regardless of source) rather than dome ADMISSION via fabricated OPEN-007. All OPEN-007/009/010 citations removed. Preemptive counter added: n(r) is a medium property, not source-selective; at moon orbit n=1.44 (4800x atmosphere), claiming moonlight is unbent while sunlight shifts 1500km is contradictory.
